name: New Relic
description: New Relic provides application performance monitoring, infrastructure monitoring, synthetic monitoring, and alerting. Query telemetry data with NRQL, manage alert policies and conditions, track deployments, and configure synthetic monitors.

capabilities.name: applications_list
capabilities.description: List all monitored applications with their health status and performance summaries.

capabilities.name: applications_get
capabilities.description: Get detailed information about a specific monitored application.

capabilities.name: applications_update
capabilities.description: Update application settings like Apdex threshold and server-side config.

capabilities.name: applications_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an application that is no longer reporting.

capabilities.name: applications_metrics_list
capabilities.description: List available metric names for an application.

capabilities.name: applications_metric_data_get
capabilities.description: Get metric timeslice data for an application.

capabilities.name: alert_policies_list
capabilities.description: List all alert policies configured in the account.

capabilities.name: alert_policies_create
capabilities.description: Create a new alert policy with incident preference.

capabilities.name: alert_policies_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing alert policy.

capabilities.name: alert_policies_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an alert policy.

capabilities.name: alert_conditions_list
capabilities.description: List NRQL alert conditions for a specific policy.

capabilities.name: alert_conditions_create
capabilities.description: Create a new NRQL alert condition.

capabilities.name: nrql_query
capabilities.description: Execute an NRQL query via the NerdGraph GraphQL API to retrieve telemetry data.

capabilities.name: synthetics_monitors_list
capabilities.description: List all synthetic monitors with their status and configuration.

capabilities.name: synthetics_monitors_get
capabilities.description: Get a specific synthetic monitor by ID.

capabilities.name: synthetics_monitors_create
capabilities.description: Create a new synthetic monitor.

capabilities.name: synthetics_monitors_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing synthetic monitor.

capabilities.name: synthetics_monitors_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a synthetic monitor.

capabilities.name: deployments_list
capabilities.description: List deployment records for an application.

capabilities.name: deployments_create
capabilities.description: Record a new deployment for an application.

capabilities.name: key_transactions_list
capabilities.description: List all key transactions.

capabilities.name: notification_channels_list
capabilities.description: List all alert notification channels.
